'''Soronia''' was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. It was a frozen, rocky world and had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" /> Soronia and the other lifeless world in the [[Star system/Legends|star system]], [[Crollia]], were both located on the fringes of the system, and were believed to have naturally formed in orbit around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Corell/Legends|Corell]]—unlike the other [[Five Brothers/Legends|five worlds]], which were placed in the system through the use of [[Centerpoint Station]].

{{Planet-stub}}
